concerns.text: FR-007 mandates a 'Mapping Protocol' using heuristics to link bulk and surface data. The tasks.md explicitly rejects this approach (T023-CONFLICT-RESOL, T059, T081) in favor of strict unique identifier alignment. There is NO task implementing the heuristic mapping protocol required by FR-007. The spec requirement is unimplemented and contradicts the plan.

FR-008 requires sensitivity analysis on 'crosslinker density' with at least three definitions. Task T041 implements this, but T041 is placed in Phase 4 (US2) while the Plan (Phase 1.7) and Constitution (VI) imply this validation must occur BEFORE modeling to ensure construct validity. The current task placement risks training models on invalid proxies before the gate is checked.
Task T096-AMEND-SC004 flags a typo in SC-004 ('-hour') but does not provide a task to actually fix the spec text. The spec remains untestable. A task to update spec.md:SC-004 is missing.
Task T023-CONFLICT-RESOL documents the rejection of FR-007 but does not include a task to formally amend the spec.md to remove or correct FR-007. The spec remains in a contradictory state.
